LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MARTIN BENDER'S MOTION TO VACATE THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MAY 18, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. ALL PARTIES SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING, OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS ON THIS MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IT APPEARS THAT RESPONDENTS SMITH AND DOW PATTEN HAVE NOT FILED OPPOSITION PAPERS TO THIS MOTION AND MAY INSTEAD BE RELYING ON THEIR RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED PETITION WHICH THEY FILED ON DECEMBER 19, 2016 AS THEIR OPPOSITION PAPERS TO THIS MOTION. IN THEIR COVER LETTER WITH THE COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS THAT THEY DELIVER TO DEPARTMENT 302, RESPONDENTS NEED TO CLARIFY WHAT PAPERS THEY INTEND TO SERVE AS THEIR OPPOSITION PAPERS TO THIS MOTION. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189 =302/HK
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-26-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Fee Award And P&Amp;A In Support Of.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MARTIN BENDER's Motion To Vacate Fee Award is taken under submission. Court waiting for the petitioner's request for a statement of decision which is to be filed by today. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Fee Award And P&Amp;A In Support Of.
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Continued To May-26-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. M. JUDE EGAN, TEL. NO. 1-805-332-3794 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
MARTIN BENDER- PETITIONER ALSO PRESENT IN COURT;
ATTY. DOW M. PATTEN OF SMITH & PATTEN, TEL. NO. 1-213-488-1300 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Petitioner's Request for a Statement of Decision is Granted and will be filed by May 26, 2017. Petitioner Martin Bender's motion to vacate attorney-client fee award is continued to May 26, 2017 and deemed submitted on that date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting An Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Martin Bender's motion requesting an order shortening time for order deeming admitted truth of facts is off calendar. This is an untimely discovery motion. (CCP 1005.) An order shortening time must be obtained prior to the hearing on the motion, not concurrently. Counsel for Mr. Bender may attempt to obtain an order shortening time on the court's ex parte calendar in department 302 to have the motion heard in an expeditious manner or alternatively, counsel may regularly set the motion on the court's discovery calendar in room 301. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Fee Award And P&Amp;A In Support Of.
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To May-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Martin Bender's motion to vacate the attorney-client fee award is continued to May 18, 2017, to give the parties the opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copies of their moving, opposition and reply papers on this motion to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. It appears that respondents Smith and Dow Patten have not filed opposition papers to this motion and may instead be relying on their response to the first amended petition which they filed on December 19, 2016 as their opposition papers to this motion. In their cover letter with the courtesy copies of the papers that they deliver to department 302, respondents need to clarify what papers they intend to serve as their opposition papers to this motion. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
